intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: *yawns* Alright, {callerName} from {callerLocation}. What'd you see out there?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: I've been hiking the Pacific Northwest for fifteen years. Last weekend, I saw something in the trees.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Mm. Go on.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Bipedal. Eight feet tall, easy. Covered in dark brown fur. It was watching me from maybe fifty yards.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Fifty yards. What'd it do?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Just stood there. Then it turned and walked into the forest. No rush. Like it didn't care that I saw it.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a bear standing up. They do that sometimes.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Vern, I know bears. This thing had shoulders. Arms. It walked like a man.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Fifteen years in those woods. You'd know if something was off.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: Exactly. I've seen everything out there. This was new.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Appreciate you sharing. Stay safe out there.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Thanks, Vern. I'm going back with a camera next time.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Right. So I hike a lot. Fifteen years. Last weekend I saw something big in the trees.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Define big.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Eight feet. Brown fur. Standing on two legs. Fifty yards out, just watching me.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: And?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: It walked away. Calm. Like I was the one intruding.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Probably a bear. People mistake them all the time.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: I've photographed bears for years. This wasn't a bear.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: At least you kept your distance. Some people chase these things.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I'm not stupid. Something that big, you give it space.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Fine. Bring a camera next time.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: We've got {callerName} on the line from {callerLocation}. What happened out there?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I've been hiking the Pacific Northwest for fifteen years. Last weekend, I had an encounter I can't explain.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Walk me through it. What exactly did you see?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I was on a trail near Mount Rainier. Through the trees, maybe fifty yards out, something was standing there. Bipedal, eight feet tall, covered in dark brown fur.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Fifty yards. That's close. What happened next?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: We made eye contact. At least, I think we did. Then it just turned and walked deeper into the forest. Completely calm.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a bear standing upright. They do that to get a better view.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: I've seen plenty of bears, Vern. This had human proportions. Shoulders, arms, the way it moved.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Mount Rainier. That's prime territory. Lots of sightings in that area.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's what made me call. I looked it up after. I'm not the first.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Appreciate you calling in. If you go back, bring documentation.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Already ordered a trail camera. Thanks for listening, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, you're on. Tell me what happened.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I've been hiking these woods for fifteen years. Last weekend changed everything.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Alright, I'm listening. Give me the details.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Mount Rainier area. I'm on a trail I've done dozens of times. Through the trees, fifty yards out, something massive is just standing there.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Massive how? Paint me a picture.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Eight feet, easy. Dark brown fur. Standing upright like a person. We looked at each other, then it just walked away into the forest.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Now, I have to ask - could it have been a bear? They can look pretty big standing up.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: I've been photographing wildlife for years, Vern. Bears don't walk away on two legs.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: The Pacific Northwest. That's ground zero for these sightings. You're in good company.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I never believed any of it until now. Seeing is believing, I guess.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Get yourself a good camera and go back. We need documentation.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Already on it. Thanks for taking this seriously, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: Folks, we've got {callerName} from {callerLocation}! What'd you see out there?!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern! Fifteen years hiking these woods and I finally SAW one!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Tell me everything! Where? When? What'd it look like?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Mount Rainier, last Saturday! Eight feet tall, brown fur, standing in the trees fifty yards from me!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Fifty yards! It was RIGHT THERE! What happened?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: We locked eyes, Vern! And then it just WALKED AWAY! Calm as can be!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Hold on, hold on - you're SURE it wasn't a bear? I have to ask!

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Vern, bears don't stroll away on two legs! This thing moved like a person!

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Mount Rainier! CLASSIC Bigfoot territory! This is incredible!

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I know! I never believed until now! I SAW IT!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Get back out there with a camera! We NEED footage!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: I'm going this weekend! Thanks, Vern!
